feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Not able to read MTA - user provided variables from code
entry.content:
Not able to read MTA - user provided variables from code

the user variable shows up in btp cockpit for the application

I am able to see other variables in process.env when in debug

Also added below in node module.

let envinfo = require('@sap/xsenv').loadEnv()

any pointers on how to achieve this or what is wrong ?

entry.title: SAP BTP subaccount trial Login Error
entry.content:
Hello, 

I tried to log on #SAPBTP subaccount trial for accessing the #ABAP cloud project through #ECLIPSE with appropriate login credentials, and it showed 'Sorry, we could not authenticate you. Try again.'

The same error was thrown when I tried to access the business application studio (BAS) on the SAP BTP TRIAL account.

It would be helpful if anyone guided me to rectify this issue.

 

Best wishes,

Aravindhan

entry.title: S4/HANA standard PR workflow for PR relase Email notification not recived to 2 level Approval agent
entry.content:
We are using the S4/HANA standard PR workflow for PR release (WS00000038) with 3-level approval. The first person creates and releases the PR. At that time, an email notification is sent to the second approver. However, when the second approval agent releases the PR, the email notification is not received by the third approval agent. I have already checked that email addresses are assigned for all three agents. We send email notifications through the RSWUWFML2 program with the variant below. 

Requisition release Task - TS00007986

Please let me know What Should i further check ?

entry.title: Not able to locate saved data in custom table of SAP public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,
I am referring to below link to uploaded data from excel and save it to custom table which is created in SAP S4 public cloud.


https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/easily-upload-data-from-excel-to-database-table-using-rap-model/qaq-p/13654927

back  end manage :

managed implementation in class ZBP_R_CPR_ITEM_DB_01 unique;

strict ( 2 ) ;

define behavior for ZR_CPR_ITEM_DB_01 alias AMD_ID//upload // amd_id

persistent table zcpr_item_db_01

etag master LocalLastChangedAt //comment

lock master

early numbering

authorization master( global )

{

determination AmmendamentID on save {create;}

field ( readonly )

Cputm,

Cpudt,

Cngtm,

Chuser,

LocalLastChangedAt;

 

field ( readonly ) //: update )

AmdID;

 

create;

update;

delete;

mapping for ZCPR_ITEM_DB_01

{

AmdID = amdid;

Amdno = amdno;

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

}

Front End :

 

onUpdatePriceButton: function(AmdID) {
debugger;
var oModel = this.getOwnerComponent().getModel();

//all excel file data
var items = this.getView().getModel("localModel").getData().items;

var indices = this.byId("ExcellUploadTable").getSelectedIndices();



for (var i = 0; i < indices.length; i++) {
// var obj = items[i];
var obj = items[indices[i]];
var oldfr = this.onDateConvert(obj['Old From']);
var Enddate = this.onDateConvert( obj['End Date']);
var engdt = this.onDateConvert(obj['Entered at']);
var ExcellpayLoad={
"AmdID": parseInt(Math.random()*1000).toString(),
//"AmdID": obj['POAM ID'],
"Amdno": obj['POAM No'] ,
"Lifnr": obj['Vendor'],
"Bstnk": obj['PO Number'],
"Posex" : obj['item'] ,
.

.

.

.

.

.


};

var that =this;
this.oModel.create("/ZCPR_UPLOAD", ExcellpayLoad, {
success: function(response) {
sap.m.MessageToast.show("Excell File Data Saved Successfully.");
},
error: function(error) {
sap.m.MessageToast.show("Failed to save Excell Fil Data.");
}
});

}


I have already created oData and published it. The oData is being consumed from Fiori application. The Fiori application is uploading excel sheet properly and seems like saving data.
I have created another oData to fetch the table content. The same is again used in Fiori application for consumption. The fiori application is displaying data properly.
However, in Eclipse ADT when CDS view is created on the same table to check if the data is saved or not. It's not reflecting.
I am confused, from where the data is stored.
Your help is appreciated.
Regards,
Rutuja.

entry.title: AbapMessageNumber 023 of CSAP_ORD_BOM_CREATE
entry.content:
• When I run the BAPI function CSAP_ORD_BOM_CREATE,  there is a exception with AbapMessageClass = "29" and AbapMessageNumber = "023" (Message short text: You are not authorized to create this BOM).
  • When I run the BAPI function CSAP_ORD_BOM_DELETE,  there is a exception with AbapMessageClass = "29" and AbapMessageNumber = "024" (Message short text: You are not authorized to change this BOM).
  • When I run the BAPI function CSAP_ORD_BOM_ITEM_SELECT,  there is a exception message:        {"Function module \"CSAP_ORD_BOM_ITEM_SELECT\" cannot be used for 'remote' calls."}

Please kindly guide how to solve the above problems. Many thanks!

entry.title: How to access the Z class in Fiori?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I Need to access the Z class from outside SAP which was created in SAP. In SAP GUI I can access through the Odata. But in Eclipse how to create an Odata. If possible to create it on Eclipse I can access the class through Odata. I need to access the class outside SAP. Can anyone suggest your valuable idea?

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: DYNAMIC SEARCH help F4IF_INT_TABLE_VALUE_REQUEST not showing all the values from internal table
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

I am creating a dynamic search help in Module Pool program. 

Under  AT SELECTION SCREEN ON VALUE REQUEST  Event, the below shown code is written.

 

I am trying to fetch all the records from custom table into t_ymcreq internal table in QAS. In debugging mode I can see that all the records (5512 records) from the database table is getting moved into internal table t_ymcreq. When I do F6 to get the popup as search help , the number of records I can see is only 5000 records in QAS .  IDEALLY as per my expectation , there should be all 5512 records should be shown in popup.

In Development 

everything is working fine in dev server. the table is haviing 3000+ records which are getting displayed as popup also. 

The issue is there only in QAS .

Is there any limit to the number of records to be shown in search help ?

entry.title: what is the difference between adobe forms on public cloud and sap form services by adobe?
entry.content: SAP BTP, ABAP environment  SAP Forms service by Adobe SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: BTP SAP UI5 open access for non SAP user
entry.content:
Hi folks,

is it possible for SAP UI5 app in BTP to make it to public so the Non SAP user can access it 

ex. If the non SAP user search the website in chrome they should be able to see the content of the SAP UI5 app

entry.title: how to avoid database vendor code 17
entry.content:
Hi all

A couple years ago I started getting database vendor code17. Someone here told me the CR runtime I was using was old. True story. upgraded fro SP13 to SP25 and fixed. Now I am getting again. SP35 is what I am using now and the latest Crystal Reports compiled in. My app reaches into SQL to insert/edit data just fine but when it comes to CR reaching in, this happens. I have about 100 computers at various locations all running fine. This one problem child vexes me though. Worst of all, they had the old SP13 runtime version and when I upgraded them, this started. My problem user is on MS Server 12 and SQL 16. Thank you.

entry.title: Update Property tree CG02 specification using BAPI_BUS1077_CHANGE
entry.content:
Hi experts, i am trying to update property tree in specifications(CG02) using BAPI_BUS1077_Change, but some how its not updating the property tree values. 

could you please some one came across the similar requirement,  please help us.

entry.title: Runtime error(short dump) in ALV report while entering MTART
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Kindly help and assist me , where i did mistake in program.

thanks in advance.

regards.

entry.title: Add subtotal in RAP unmanaged query
entry.content:
Hi,

I have been doing some research on how to do this. I saw that this is very implement with managed query (via CDS views) using aggregate CDS annotations (only for oData v2 read-only apps).

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/annotating-aggregate-functions-in-cds

However, it doesn't seem to be working when I do the same thing via an unmanaged query. I have also tried playing around with the UI.presentationvariant annotations but no luck, it is also working only for managed queries.

I have also tried implementing the logic from the link below in my unmanaged query provider class, but there seems to be a problem and is resulting to a dump.

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/implementing-aggregations-in-unmanaged-query

The dump is caused by the incorrect select query.

 

 SELECT (lv_req_elements) FROM /dmo/travel

 WHERE (lv_sql_filter)

 GROUP BY (lv_grouping)

 ORDER BY (lv_sort_string)

 INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE @lt_travel_response

 OFFSET @lv_offset UP TO @lv_max_rows ROWS.

 

The LV_REQ_ELEMENTS variable from io_request->get_requested_elements( ) only contains the BOOKING_FEE field.

The LV_GROUPING variable from io_request->get_aggregation( )->get_grouped_elements( ) is empty even though I specified the groupBy annotation in the PresentationVariant.

The LV_SORT_STRING variable from io_request->get_sort_elements( ) is also empty. 

Does anybody know whether the @Aggregation.Default and presentationVariant is released for unmanaged query oData v2? 

    presentationVariant: [{
        sortOrder: [{
            by: 'Agency_ID',
            direction: #ASC
        }],
       groupBy : [ 'Agency_ID' ],
       totalBy : [ 'Agency_ID' ],
       total : [ 'Booking_Fee' ],
        visualizations: [{
            type: #AS_LINEITEM
        }]
    }]

@Andre_Fischer , just wondering if you have any thoughts on this? Thanks!

entry.title: Conversion Routine in AMDP for MATERIAL (MATNR)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How can we use 'CONVERSION_EXIT_MATN1_INPUT'  in AMDP, where we need to convert Material No, into internal formant ? we have to avoid loop

entry.title: Error obtaining SAP screen content
entry.content: Hello, everyone. I have a question. When I used the SapBuild platform to get the screen of SAP application, the screen of SAP application captured was not the screen of SAP but the screen shot of SapBuild platform. Why is this and how can I solve it?

entry.title: database vendor code 17. Using VS2022 and SQL2016 ADO connection. SP35 runtime
entry.content: one user out of 100 cannot print. I posted a week or so ago and no answers so hoping this time someone sees it that has an answer.  thanks !

entry.title: Location where SAP removes the Payment block on Invoice
entry.content:
Hello,

Just for example,

Yesterday: Incoming Invoice / MIRO MRM Invoice got Payment block (Invoice Verification) on it because of the Qty. Variance (in our case its because of No GR), well

Today: User done GR (say via MIGO) so the SAP removed the Payment Block from Invoice (Free for Payment)

Pls. let us know where / the location of the logic the SAP is removing this block because we want to place our custom code there itself, based on that location, near by, I will search for BADI/Exit/ENH for to place our Z code

entry.title: ISSUE : BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE adding new item
entry.content:
I trying to add new batch split using BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE ( T-code VL02N)
Its urgent . Please help me on this 

Getting this error : Essential transfer parameters are missing in record: 000001 .


Here is my code :



Regards ,
Vasanth

entry.title: QR Code issue if Invoice has multiple Pages
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I have Created a QR Code and attached in SAP Script. Now it is working properly when the invoice has one page. But if invoice line items flows two second page the Qr Code is not Getting Printed in SAP SAcript.

 

If anybody faced this issue can suggest me a solution

 

Regards,

Mantri Shekar.

entry.title: How to call a web service with user credentials dynamically in BTP
entry.content:
Hello Friends,

I have a requirement to call a Webservice in BTP Process Automation.   It works good through the "Call Webservice with Destination".  Whereas I would like to pass the Credentials at dynamically.

[Note: The reason behind this is, whenever there is a change in the SAP Login Password, we need to change the password in the respective Destinations also in the BTP Cockpit, every time.  Maintaining the password in every destination is little difficult as lots of destinations are there.  We cant even ask the user to do this exercise. ]

Please help me.
